text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship told me she wants to go shopping, so
here we are in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I snagged some sesame-miso flavored
space macarons.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I wanna try the sweet and savory fried chicken
and the boiled egg flavors too, so they're on my
list for next time.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's with all the hustle and bustle over
there?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Did you hear that?! There's a raffle!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of, I got a piece of paper when I bought
the macarons. Must be a raffle ticket.
choice_data_list: Want to give it a try?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Forget going big or going home. I'm aiming
for the booby prize!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, so you guys got a booby prize for losers
too? What is it? The carrot, or the stick? Or
maybe even a wrecking ball!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Boldly aiming for the worst prize, Gold Ship turns
the handle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I-I got the grand-prize?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Holy beneficial gut bacteria! That's like the polar
opposite of the booby prize!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I really got the ticket for a hot spring vacation...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I was after the booby prize, but hey, this is
awesome!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
A hot spring, huh? They're not fun to go to alone,
though. Who should I—oh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If I just make a shadow clone of myself to go with,
then all my problems will be solved! Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Time to try it out! Hiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Shadow clooone! SPLIT!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... huff... puff... Well, that didn't work.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
How could I, Goddess Golshi the All-Capable, fail
to make a simple shadow clone?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Dang... Welp, you hang onto the ticket for now.
Here.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Keep it someplace I can't see it until I master how
to shadow clone.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, otherwise I'll end up using it before I
master the art!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not entirely sure Gold Ship ever will master
shadow cloning, but I do as she asks and keep the
ticket for her.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! A deluxe carrot hamburger steak?! Lucky
me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We're having marbled steaks for dinner tonight,
so this'll be perfect for desser―

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hold up a sec. This could be a golden opportunity
to develop a brand-new space macaron flavor!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
First, I eat the deluxe carrot hamburger steak,
yeah? Then, I write a review, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And then, I send it directly to the big shots at the
space macaron factory.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
They love the idea, and next thing you know,
they're releasing their brand new carrot
hamburger steak flavor space macarons!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I can see it now! C'mon! We've got a foodie
review to write!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to revolutionize space macarons, we start
conducting research on carrot hamburger steaks.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that's more of a mountain than a bushel.
What should I do with all these?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! Almost forgot. There's an intense
training session for hopeful restaurant
proprietresses coming up soon.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Slicing and dicing these carrots will be perfect
practice!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'll master how to cut them into flowers, stars, and
butterflies, then move onto shaping them like
Gothic architecture...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That'll knock the socks off the current
proprietress for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we get back to the dorm, I watch Gold Ship
practice cutting the carrots into decorative
shapes.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aw man! Third-prize? And it's just one carrot!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's neither the booby prize nor the grand-prize...
I don't even know how to react. But!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I turned a piece of paper into a carrot. That's
gotta be a miracle of some kind, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, paper! Thank you, carrot! It just goes
to show that food is precious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We discuss just how grateful we are for the single
carrot the whole way home.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: The booby prize! That's what I'm talkin' ab—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hold up. A pack of tissues? That's it? So much for
the carrot or the stick, then. Not even a little a
wrecking ball...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
On a side note, do you know what happens when
you make a paper airplane out of a tissue?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Some say it's shocking how poorly it flies, but
others say it's so light that it never lands.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Let's go find out who's right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship pulls the booby prize just as she
wanted, but unfortunately the item itself is not
what she expected.
